titleStmt.title: SII 28.46: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 46. (A.R. No. 46 of 1913.) SIVĀYAM, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Śivapurīśvara Temple, central shrine, south wall of the maṇḍapa in front.

The beginning of the record is lost. The available portion starts with the details of the boundaries. It seems to record that Kāḷi-Aḻagiya-chōḻa-chcheṭṭiyār was to hold the temple land of 2 mā extent capable of growing one crop as kuḍi-nīṅgāda (without having the kuḍi removed) dēvadāna and remit into the treasury (śri-bhaṇḍāram) of the temple of Tirumāṇikkamalai-uḍaiya-nāyanār, 9 kalam per annum. The Ādi-daṇḍēśvara-dēvakaṉmigaḷ of the temple undertook to expend that paddy during three festivals. Irāja-rāja-Viḻupparaiyar and Kārāṇai-Viḻupparaiyar are sold to have held two plots of land designated as chaṭṭippuṟam (land earmarked for the supply of pots or rice for food-offering to the temple) of the Tirukkaḍamban-tuṟai-uḍaiya-nāyāṉār, which were on the boundary of the land referred to above. One of the signatories for the record was the nagarakkaṇkāṇi (supervisor of the nagaram ?).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nilamāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai tirukkaṭampantuṟai Uṭaiya nāyaṉār caṭṭi
ppuṟam Irācarāca viḻupparaiyar nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkkellai Iṉṉāya
ṉār caṭṭippuṟattukku vaṭakkum mepāṟkellaiyum Iṉṉāyanār caṭṭip
puṟam kārāṇai viḻupparaiyar nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kiḻakko
ṭi Uḷciṟu vāykkālukku teṟkkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa Oru pū rūpāyThis symbol reads for nilam
2 māThis symbol read for māIṉnilam Iraṇṭumāvum Ivarkuṭi niṅkāta tevatāṉamāka Aṉupavi
ttu māttāl nāṟkaleṉa tūṇippatakkāka vanta nellu Āṇṭutoṟum ciri
paṇṭārattile cilavākakkaṭavarākavum Innellu Oṉpatiṉ kalamum tirunāḷ muṉ
ṟukkum cantiṟātittavaraiyum Ivar Ippaṭiyāy vanta nellu Aḷakka nāṅka
ḷum Ippaṭiye Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kalveṭṭik ku
ṭuttom kāḷi Aḻakiya coḻacceṭṭiyāṟku Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiya nāyaṉār
koyil Ātitaṇṭecura tevakaṉmikaḷḷom § Ippaṭikku Ivai Āṭaviṭaṅkappiccar
Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai kovaṇavāṭiyār Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai nakarak
kaṇkāṇi civapātacekarapurapiccar Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai tevakaṉmi poṟ
koyilppaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku koyil kaṇakkuStops here.
Digital edition of SII 28.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
